args: Top-bar left cluster: hamburger-first reorder, coarse touch target, and RunKit wordmark. 1) Move the sidebar toggle (hamburger) to be the first element on the left, before the brand crumb, and outside the breadcrumb nav. 2) Add coarse:min-h-[30px] coarse:min-w-[30px] to the hamburger to match the top-bar button-control vocabulary. 3) Rename the wordmark 'Run Kit' to 'RunKit' to match document.title/manifest, sweeping all remaining user-visible 'Run Kit' strings (wordmark span, 'Run Kit home' aria-label, overflow-menu version row + aria-label).
